name: How long does a comp case for respiratory exposure take?

mainEntity.name: How long does a comp case for respiratory exposure take?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**3-12 months typically; faster if undisputed, longer with appeals.**

Involves medical exams, investigations[2]. Utah/Idaho hearings 60-180 days post-filing.

- Temporary benefits quick.
- Settlements speed resolution.
- Appeals add 6+ months.

Stay in treatment; attorney expedites. Patience needed for full value[2].
